===================
=== bd1989-08-31_englewood.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 8/31/89, Englewood, 2CDR

(58min+41min), not much above 19k; slight hiss; background talking d1t2,d1t5, d1t9, d1t10; very good sound [B+]

CD1

1 E-Thang 
2 Positively 4th Street 
3 Seeing The Real You At Last 
4 Masters Of War 
5 The Man In Me 
6 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 
7 SimpleTwist Of Fate 
8 To Ramona (acoustic) 
9 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic) 
10 Mr.Tambourine Man (acoustic)

CD2

1 One Irish Rover 
2 I'll Remember You 
3 Silvio 
4 I Shall Be Released 
5 Like A Rolling Stone 
6 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue(acoustic) 
7 Rank Strangers To Me (acoustic->electric) 
8 Maggie's Farm 


This was originallly LB-2269, but had many tiny gaps between the tracks which I removed (see list below). I also patched one channel in d1t10 for a short while as it fell very low.



removed silence:
end d1t3
end d1t6
end d1t7 (plus gap near end)
end d1t9
end d1t10

end d2t2
beg d2t3
end d2t3
beg d2t4
end d2t4
beg d2t5
end d2t6
beg d2t7
end d2t7
beg d2t8
===================
